payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Off-white rectangular picture frame with a wide outer border and two vertical internal openings (double-mat) showing pale or blank content; appears wall-mounted, small and blurred in this low-resolution crop, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"small white double-mat frame","long_description":"Off-white rectangular picture frame with a wide outer border and two vertical internal openings (double-mat) showing pale or blank content; appears wall-mounted, small and blurred in this low-resolution crop, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.","attributes":["off-white/beige frame","rectangular shape","double vertical openings (double-mat)","wide outer mat/border","wall-mounted","small/tiny in crop","blurred / low resolution"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
